calendar.matters:
Petition For Determination Under Probate Code 21320, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Dec-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 265730 Rev. Trust of Hilda E. Cole case number 267037 Re: Shirley Cole Roe Trust of 1988.

Appearances: Thomas Latham for David Roe (Trustee).

Mr. Latham stated that he received a call from Michelle Trausch and an e-mail from Caroline Hinshaw with regard to a settlement being reached between Gregory Bogdan and Hilda Roe. In addition, he stated that he was informed by Ms. Hinshaw that Hilda wanted the agreement to be kept confidential, that he had not seen the stipulation/agreement and that he was not comfortable discussing other Counsels' positions. The three Declaratory Relief petitions were granted (subject to the written orders). The three Motions for Consolidation were granted without prejudice subject to David Roe's right to bifurcate or severe issues (subject to the written orders). All of the accountings were continued to January 11, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
